name: Builder
description: Artifact builder for sketch enhancement and variant generation. Lives in chat as a tabbed surface beside Sketch.
author: contex

chatSurfaces.label: Builder
chatSurfaces.description: Generate and iterate on HTML artifacts inside chat.

actions.name: generate
actions.description: Generate a builder artifact from a prompt. Params: { prompt: string }

actions.name: setHtml
actions.description: Set the current builder HTML directly. Params: { html: string }

actions.name: setPrompt
actions.description: Set the current builder prompt without generating. Params: { prompt: string }

actions.name: setSettings
actions.description: Update builder API settings. Params: { model?: string, baseUrl?: string, apiKey?: string }
